title: Fullmetal Alchemist Replacement Confirms Episode Count After April Debut
content: The mind behind one of the greatest anime and manga stories of all time, Fullmetal Alchemist , has returned with a new anime airing this April, and has confirmed how long it’s going to be sticking around for.
author: ComicBook

title: The Detective Is Already Dead Anime Unveils Season 2's 1st Video, Switch Game
content: Kadokawa presented the first promotional video and first key visual for the second television anime season based on Nigojū and Umibōzu 's The Detective Is Already Dead ( Tantei wa Mō, Shindeiru. ) light novel series, on Sunday.
author: ANN

title: The Detective Is Already Dead Season 2 Unveils First Key Visual, Trailer
content: The upcoming The Detective Is Already Dead Season 2 anime unveiled its first key visual and trailer on Sunday. The sequel was originally set to premiere this July but was delayed to October due to production circumstances. Studio ENGI returns to animate the sequel with Manabu Kurihara as director.
author: Anime Corner

title: 7 Best Anime Series of Winter 2026, Ranked
content: As the second week of Spring 2026 approaches, every anime that aired in Winter 2026 has finally come to an end, and it has been one of the best seasons in anime. This lineup alone makes it one of the strongest seasons in years, offering everything from slice-of-life and political drama to heavy action series.
author: ComicBook

title: 86's Asato Asato Launches New Light Novel Series in June
content: Kadokawa 's Dengeki Bunko imprint is currently listing that it will release the first volume of a new light novel series by Asato Asato on June 10 titled Yaebuki Kikan: Senmanjō Tō Tōha Roku (roughly, "Yaebuki Agency: Record of Traversing the Senmanjō Tower," but "Senmanjō" could also mean a unit of measurement of "10…
author: ANN

title: Inklore Announces New Titles, Previews at Anime Boston
content: Inklore , Penguin Random House 's imprint for manga and webcomics, revealed new acquisitions and previews during its industry panel at Anime Boston on April 4. The panel included the announcement of upcoming print publications for Her Tale of Shim Chong by Seri and Biwan and The Red Sleeve by KANG Mikang,…
author: ANN

title: Star Detective Precure! Anime Gets Film Opening on September 18
content: The staff for Star Detective Precure! , the 23rd main anime entry in the Precure franchise, revealed on Sunday the series is getting a film titled Eiga Meitantei Precure! (Star Detective Precure! The Movie) that will open in Japan on September 18. The franchise also revealed a teaser video and a visual.
author: ANN

title: 5 Best Anime That Gets You Hooked From Episode 1
content: The first episode gives viewers a general idea of what to expect from an anime, which is all the more reason it has to be exciting enough to capture their attention. In an endless ocean of popular and underrated shows, only a few stand out with an intriiguing introduction in the first episode.
author: ComicBook
